text.message: C.L.A.W = Chris Lies And Wins. Don't forget!
More like GLAW after winning our last 3 games, John...
I assume the G stands for Gatto?
and I'm in last place for June
look at this funny guy over here
8 point lead for the year, can't let him run away with it
and bot steal, maybe it's not a bot
this may be the end game
Patrick will win on his turn
if only I could trade on a special build phase
